message:
feat(lyapunov): Add deterministic cancel-drain + quiescence tests (bd-25j2)

Five new lab-based tests verify Lyapunov potential V(Σ) properties on
the real LabRuntime: monotone decrease during cancel-drain, deterministic
trajectories across identical seeds, all snapshot fields zero at
quiescence, convergence with many tasks, and convergence across all
weight configurations. Removes inline create_obligation calls from the
task-only tests (no obligations needed for nonzero V via task/region
components) and fixes the obligation-aware helper to disable
panic_on_obligation_leak so explicit check_invariants() works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
